7,609 reviews. 4.6 stars. And most tourists still walk past Sol by Meliá Phú Quốc for the bigger resort names.

Bright rooms, beach views, 3 restaurants, 2 bars, and a pool that actually gets sun all day. This is the move if you want polish without the chaos.
